Operation 'CreateAlert' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too generic and lacks critical details. AI agents need to understand: what alert types are available, what parameters are required (email, frequency, type), what the response contains, and when notifications will start. Enhanced description provides this context for better agent decision-making.

data.current_description: This endpoint allows you to create a new alert.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new email alert for your SendGrid account. Specify the alert type (e.g., statistics, usage), recipient email address, and frequency (as needed, hourly, daily, weekly, or monthly). Returns the created alert object with a unique alert_id. The alert will begin sending notifications according to the specified schedule.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks critical details. AI agents need to understand: what alert types are available, what parameters are required (email, frequency, type), what the response contains, and when notifications will start. Enhanced description provides this context for better agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'ListAlert' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about what data is returned. AI agents need to know the response structure (array of alerts) and what fields each alert contains to determine if this operation meets their needs.

data.current_description: This endpoint allows you to retrieve all of your alerts.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all email alerts configured for your SendGrid account. Returns an array of alert objects, each containing the alert_id, type, recipient email address, frequency, and current status. Use this to view your complete alert configuration.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what data is returned. AI agents need to know the response structure (array of alerts) and what fields each alert contains to determine if this operation meets their needs.

message: Operation 'GetAlert' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. AI agents need to know: the required parameter (alert_id), what fields are returned in the response, and the use case for this operation versus listing all alerts.

data.current_description: This endpoint allows you to retrieve a specific alert.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the details of a specific alert by its alert_id. Returns the alert object containing the type, recipient email address, frequency, and current status. Use this to view the configuration of an individual alert.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. AI agents need to know: the required parameter (alert_id), what fields are returned in the response, and the use case for this operation versus listing all alerts.

message: Operation 'DeleteAlert' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about side effects. AI agents need to understand: the required parameter (alert_id), that deletion is permanent, and that notifications will cease immediately. This helps agents avoid unintended deletions.

data.current_description: This endpoint allows you to delete an alert.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a specific alert by its alert_id. Once deleted, no further notifications will be sent for this alert. This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Requires the alert_id parameter.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about side effects. AI agents need to understand: the required parameter (alert_id), that deletion is permanent, and that notifications will cease immediately. This helps agents avoid unintended deletions.

message: Operation 'UpdateAlert' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague. AI agents need to know: the required parameter (alert_id), which fields can be updated, that partial updates are supported, what the response contains, and when changes take effect. This enables agents to make informed update decisions.

data.current_description: This endpoint allows you to update an alert.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing alert configuration by its alert_id. Supports partial updates to the recipient email address, frequency (as needed, hourly, daily, weekly, or monthly), or alert type. Returns the updated alert object with all current settings. Changes take effect immediately.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague. AI agents need to know: the required parameter (alert_id), which fields can be updated, that partial updates are supported, what the response contains, and when changes take effect. This enables agents to make informed update decisions.
